requirement: [Memory Deallocation] Automatically reclaim GPU memory allocated by terminated processes

test_cases.description: Validate that GPU memory allocated by a terminated process is automatically reclaimed
test_cases.expected_result: GPU memory previously allocated by the terminated process is reclaimed

test_cases.description: Verify that GPU memory is correctly deallocated when multiple processes terminate
test_cases.expected_result: All GPU memory allocated by terminated processes is successfully reclaimed

test_cases.description: Test the scenario where no processes are running to allocate GPU memory
steps: Monitor GPU memory after a period
test_cases.expected_result: No GPU memory deallocation should occur as there are no processes to terminate

test_cases.description: Evaluate the performance of GPU memory deallocation with a large memory allocation
steps: Allocate a large amount of memory on GPU
test_cases.expected_result: GPU memory deallocation for large allocations should be efficient and timely

test_cases.description: Integrate memory deallocation feature with GPU driver functionality
test_cases.expected_result: Memory deallocation process should seamlessly integrate with GPU driver operations
